description: An IoT-powered smart home dashboard integrating sensors, real-time data, and automation controls.
title: Smart Home Display
problem: Home automation systems are often fragmented and hard to monitor in one place.
solution: Built a unified dashboard that reads sensor data and controls smart devices through a single interface.
tagline: An IoT-powered smart home dashboard integrating sensors and automation.

description: A productivity app using the Pomodoro technique with analytics, habit tracking, and beautiful visualizations.
title: Focus App
problem: Students struggle with focus and time management during study sessions.
solution: Created a focus timer app with analytics that helps users build productive habits over time.
tagline: A productivity app using the Pomodoro technique with analytics and habit tracking.

case_study: This portfolio is more than a static page — it's a living digital headquarters. Every section is editable through a custom CMS admin dashboard. The design uses a dark-mode-first aesthetic with glassmorphism, animated gradients, and Framer Motion transitions. Built to scale from university through career.
description: A responsive personal portfolio built with modern web technologies showcasing my work and experience.
title: Portfolio Website
problem: Needed a professional digital presence that grows with me from university through my career.
solution: Built a dynamic, CMS-driven personal brand platform with a full admin dashboard, animated interactions, and dark-mode-first design.
tagline: A responsive personal portfolio built with modern web technologies showcasing my work and experience.

description: A data visualization dashboard for tracking social media campaign performance and engagement metrics across platforms.
title: Marketing Analytics Dashboard
problem: Marketing teams lacked a unified view of campaign performance across multiple social platforms.
solution: Built an interactive dashboard that aggregates data from multiple APIs and visualizes key metrics in real-time.
tagline: A data visualization dashboard for tracking social media campaign performance and engagement metrics.

description: An interactive learning platform designed to teach coding fundamentals to young students through gamification.
title: STEM Education Platform
problem: Young students lose interest in coding when the learning experience lacks engagement.
solution: Created a gamified platform that teaches Scratch and Python through interactive challenges and rewards.
tagline: An interactive learning platform designed to teach coding fundamentals to young students through gamification.
